subject: [PATCH v3 2/3] mm/swap: use swap_ops to register swap device's methods

reviews.author: Baoquan He
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch incorrectly assumed sis->ops is always non-NULL and would return -1 if it's NULL, but instead wanted to check for missing operations read_folio or write_folio
reviews.raw_body:
You are right. Think one thing, write another. Will fix it in v4.
Thanks a lot for your careful reviewing.

2026-04-15.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the swap device registration code where it incorrectly checks for swap operations. It changes the check to ensure that all necessary operations (read_folio and write_folio) are available before proceeding, preventing swapon from failing unnecessarily.
